headline: Framework delays its first Laptop 13 Pro shipments by a month
summary: Framework Laptop 13 Pro shipments are delayed. The original June launch is now pushed to July. Some deliveries might even slip into early August.

headline: Apple’s new Siri AI knows when to shut up
summary: Apple's new Siri AI has been released and appears to work well. Users describe the AI as 'curt,' which is considered a compliment. It avoids the typical verbose responses of other AI chatbots.

headline: Nearly a million passports and photo IDs were left unprotected on the public internet
summary: Around a million passports and photo IDs were found exposed online. Identity documents of complete strangers from various countries were accessible. This data breach highlights significant privacy concerns.

headline: Xbox warns of a ‘reset’ as it prepares for layoffs
summary: Microsoft's Xbox division is preparing for significant layoffs next month. Xbox CEO Asha Sharma previously hinted at "making hard choices." Sources suggest cuts could include studio closures or major restructuring.

headline: Xbox's Project Helix Seems to Be Targeting a Holiday 2027 Release, According to New Memo from CEO Asha Sharma
summary: Xbox's Project Helix is reportedly targeting a Holiday 2027 release. A new memo from CEO Asha Sharma emphasizes this focus. The release window comes amidst ongoing rumors and speculation.

headline: Xbox Reportedly Planning 'Significant' Layoffs, Budget Cuts for Marketing, and More
summary: Xbox is reportedly planning 'significant' layoffs across its divisions. CEO Asha Sharma has outlined plans for a business 'reset.' Budget cuts are also expected for marketing and other areas.

headline: Get an Apple Watch Ultra for Just $299 and Have it Delivered Before Father's Day
summary: Score an Apple Watch Ultra for only $299. This renewed 'excellent condition' unit offers $450 in savings. Ensure delivery before Father's Day with this limited-time deal.

headline: You Can Get a 48V 400W Adult Electric Bike With 20mph Top Speed and 32 Mile Range for Just $159
summary: Purchase a 48V 400W adult electric bike for an incredible $159. The bike offers a top speed of 20mph and a 32-mile range. This deal is expected to sell out quickly.

headline: Water cannon fired in latest disorder after Belfast knife attack
summary: Riot police deployed water cannons during disorder in Belfast. The unrest followed a recent knife attack in the area. Police faced sustained attacks from groups throwing bricks and bottles.

headline: Iran says it struck ships in Strait of Hormuz after US launches new strikes
summary: Iran claims responsibility for striking ships in the Strait of Hormuz. This action follows new airstrikes initiated by the United States. US Central Command cited Iran's "unwarranted and continued aggression."

headline: Essex Police given new information on West Ham co-owner David Sullivan
summary: Essex Police have received new information regarding West Ham co-owner David Sullivan. The update follows a joint investigation by BBC Panorama and The Times. Details of the new information have not been publicly disclosed.

headline: Fireworks illuminate Barcelona's Sagrada Família during Pope visit
summary: Fireworks illuminated Barcelona's iconic Sagrada Família. The display occurred during Pope Leo XIV's visit to Spain. The Pope praised the basilica as a masterpiece of "stones, colours and light."
